name: DialogCloseButtonComponent
description:
Directive that applies fundamental dialog styling to a dialog close button.

```html
<button fd-dialog-close-button></button>
```

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description: add aria label dynamically to add to the button

inputs.name: mobile
inputs.description: Displays dialog close button in mobile mode

inputs.name: title
inputs.description: add title dynamically to add a tooltip
